scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/assets && html-minifier-terser src/index.html -o dist/index.html --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true --minify-js true && cleancss -o dist/style.min.css src/style.css && terser src/script.js -o dist/script.min.js --compress --mangle && cp -r assets/* dist/assets/
